all changes seem to have reverted?!, see https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/cps/+/126912/14..15/cps-service/src/main/java/org/onap/cps/aop/CpsLoggingAspectService.java

"It seems to me that this changes goes beyond the scope of the Jira task that is documentation related only. I recommend to handle logging logic changes in their own dedicated Jira." 

To address above, I did it purposely and created a 2 commits one for documentation (CPS-604 : Document Logging Guidelines
) and another to handle logging logic changes in its own dedicated Jira (CPS-855 : Improve logging in NCMP)
